title: classic crosshair
description: Classic PvP texturpacks like low shild, low fire, no partikels ore small totems
body: classic PvP texture pack that you need if you wana start pvping. It adds a crosshair that can improve your minecraft skills by a lot. If you wana have a texturpack I dont have at the time feal free to join my dc server for more textur packas.
